serviceBinding.name: ZUI_STUDENT_O4
serviceBinding.description: Student Management OData V4 Service Binding

note: Service Bindings must be created via ADT (Eclipse). Right-click the package → New → Service Binding. Select binding type 'OData V4 - UI' and reference service definition ZUI_STUDENT. After creation, click 'Activate' then 'Publish' in the Service Binding editor.
